subcodes.first_line: O carpenter! Noah was a carpenter and prepared the ark of deliverance. Thou, too, must fashion the planks and beams of truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نجار نوح نجی نجار بود و سفینه نجات مهیا کرد تو نیز الواح و دسری از حقائق و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
